message:
fix(render): orphan continuation cell handling and cost model overflow

Buffer::blit_region:
- Fix orphan continuation cells at region start (dx=0) being copied verbatim
- Continuation markers from wide chars are now replaced with default cells
  when they would appear at the leftmost column without their parent char
- Prevents visual artifacts when blitting regions that split wide characters

Presenter cost model:
- Extended digit_count() to handle 4 and 5 digit numbers (up to u16::MAX)
- Previously capped at 3 for any input >= 100, causing incorrect cost
  estimation for terminal dimensions >= 1000
- Fixes suboptimal cursor movement strategy selection on large displays (4K+)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
